_comment: EDGE / Procedure A — SHORT-CIRCUIT ORDERING (highest-value coverage). This bundle fails BOTH A1 (DID unresolvable) AND A2 (signature invalid). A conforming verifier MUST report the EARLIER failure: DID_UNRESOLVABLE, because A1 runs before A2. A verifier that runs checks out of order would report SIGNATURE_INVALID and fail this fixture. This is the only fixture that tests the algorithm's step ORDERING. Expected REJECT DID_UNRESOLVABLE.
